name: Vanice Steele (AU - OC)
description:
Vanice Steele — The Rebel with a Spray Can

Blonde, blue-eyed, and born to cause a little chaos, Vanice Steele is a graffiti artist who turns back alleys into color-splashed stories. Raised between adventure and abandonment, he’s the son of Cara Lane, an Australian world explorer, and Sterling Steele, a thrill-chasing adventurer who vanished from his life long ago.

Vanice grew up chasing adrenaline, paint fumes, and purpose — with a messy streak and a loyal Rottweiler named Bones, plus an orange kitten named Riot always tagging along. Despite his rough edges and sarcastic grin, he’s got a soft spot for loyalty, music blasting from old speakers, and the dream of one day having a son named John.

Family’s a strange mix for him — stepbrother Pepper Steele, stepsister Salt Steele, and half-brother Jasper, all connected through tangled family ties and louder arguments. But they’re still his crew, whether they admit it or not.

Vanice isn’t one for tradition. If he ever finds “the one,” he’s the kind of guy to pull off a spontaneous Vegas Elvis wedding, tux half-buttoned, paint still on his hands, heart wide open for 24 hours of wild love and neon lights.

Vibe: streetlight philosopher, chaotic good energy, spray-paint poet.
Likes: late-night rooftops, punk riffs, paint-stained gloves.
Dislikes: rules, silence, and goodbyes.
creator: mochimuse1
